cities.name: Reykjavik
cities.notes: Hallgrimskirkja church, Blue Lagoon nearby and aurora viewing base

cities.name: Akureyri
cities.notes: North Iceland hub with Godafoss waterfall and whale watching

cities.name: Vik
cities.notes: Black sand Reynisfjara beach and dramatic basalt sea stacks

cities.name: Jokulsarlon
cities.notes: Glacier lagoon filled with floating icebergs calving from Vatnajokull

cities.name: Husavik
cities.notes: Whale watching capital — humpbacks almost guaranteed in summer
